description: The issue was addressed with improved memory handling. This issue is fixed in macOS Ventura 13.3, macOS Big Sur 11.7.5, watchOS 9.4, tvOS 16.4, iOS 15.7.4 and iPadOS 15.7.4, iOS 16.4 and iPadOS 16.4. Processing a maliciously crafted image may result in disclosure of process memory
